image_prompt: A whimsical digital painting in a slightly exaggerated, cartoonish style. A person with a confused, furrowed brow is intently looking through a large, antique telescope pointed directly at the wooden floor of a dimly lit room. The room is messy with maps and books. Behind the person, a large window reveals a breathtaking, clear night sky filled with countless twinkling stars. Perched on the window sill, a wise-looking owl with spectacles is looking at the person with a knowing expression, and from its beak emerges a speech bubble containing the Portuguese sentence: 'Para ver as estrelas, olhe para o céu.' The overall mood is gently humorous and insightful.
short_sentence: Para ver as estrelas, olhe para o céu.
caption: Às vezes a resposta está bem na nossa frente (ou melhor, acima de nós)! ✨ Quem nunca complicou o óbvio? Marca aquele amigo que precisa de um lembrete para olhar para cima! 😉 #OlheParaOCéu #Estrelas #FatosDaVida #CoisasÓbvias #NoiteEstrelada
